SHORT CAUSE TRIAL

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-31-2022 Continued To Feb-10-22 At 04:30 P.M. In Dept 606

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Dec-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brian Carter, 415.286.1717 of the Law Offices of Brian carter appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Kundry Rivero.
Policracia Lo Esteves, 415.264.9419 Defendant in Pro Per appearing on her own behalf.

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT POLICRACIA ESTEVES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER is DENIED. Motion is filed without required documents and is not supported by any admissible evidence. CCP 437c. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2021 Set For Trial On Jan-31-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:(ZOOM)
Brian Carter, 415.286.1717 for Plainitff Kundry Rivero.
Policracia Lo Esteves, 415..264.9419 Plaintiff on her Own Behalf.

Argued by Defendant. Defendant argues that there was no intentional and negligent infliction of emotional distress and that there should be no punitive damages. She states that the demurrer should be sustained and moved to civil limited jurisdiction. Ms.Esteves also informs the Court that she was not properly served Plaintiff's opposition to the demurrer.
Mr. Carter states that the Defendant was properly serves.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT POLICRACIA ESTEVES DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states causes of action for violation of CC 1950.5; Intentional and Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress. On a demurrer the Court cannot consider documents outside of the complaint and not subject to judicial notice. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2021 Continued To Aug-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Continued To Jun-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Courtesy copies to be delivered no later than June 4, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
